Dear {{ doc.applicant_name }},

We are pleased to appoint you in the services of {{ doc.company }} on the terms and conditions detailed in this letter.

Your designation shall be {{ doc.designation }}.

{%- if doc.offer_terms -%} {%- for row in doc.offer_terms -%} {{ row.offer_term }}: {{ row.value }}

Yours truly,



Authorized Signatory
{{ doc.company }}

html:
Shoption
Document Ref No: {{ doc.name }}
Date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.offer_date) }}

Dear {{ doc.applicant_name }},

We are pleased to extend an offer for employment at {{ doc.company }} for the position of {{ doc.designation }}. After careful consideration of your qualifications, experience, and interview performance, we are confident that your skills and attitude make you an excellent fit for our team.


The terms and conditions of your employment are outlined below:


{% for row in doc.offer_terms %}

{{ loop.index }}. {{ row.offer_term }}
{{ row.value | replace('\n', '
') | safe }}


{% endfor %}

We look forward to welcoming you to our team and wish you a successful career with us.

{{ doc.company }}

Appointment Letter

{{ doc.employee_name }}
{{ doc.employee_address }}

Dear {{ doc.employee_first_name }},

With reference to the signed offer letter, we are pleased to appoint you at {{ doc.company }} under the following terms and conditions:

Position
Job Title: {{ doc.job_title }}
Department: {{ doc.department }}
Reporting Manager: {{ doc.reporting_manager }}
Compensation

Your annual CTC will be {{ doc.annual_ctc }}. Monthly payout will be {{ doc.monthly_ctc }}, subject to performance and company policies.

Working Hours

9:30 AM to 6:30 PM, Monday to Saturday.

Probation Period

You will be on probation for six (6) months from the date of joining.

Annexure – A (Salary Breakup)
{% for row in doc.salary_breakup %} {% endfor %}
Component Amount
{{ row.component }} {{ row.amount }}

I hereby accept the above terms and conditions.



___________________________
{{ doc.employee_name }}
Employee Signature


___________________________
HR Department
{{ doc.company }}
